message:
feat: doctor detects duplicate identities between named and backup profiles

Add a doctor check that warns when a system/backup profile (_backup_*,
_original) shares the same identity subject (email/account) as a named
profile. This catches the confusing scenario from #14 where re-auth causes
the active profile to flip to a backup instead of the expected named profile.

Implementation:
- authfile.Vault.ProfileIdentity(): new exported method that extracts a
  human-readable identity string from vault profile auth files (Codex JWT
  parsing, Claude oauthAccount/.credentials.json, Gemini settings/creds)
- doctor checkDuplicateIdentities(): groups profiles by identity per tool,
  emits warnings with actionable remediation for mixed named+system groups

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
